targets.root_selector:
Results.($c := count; Classes.{
  "Name": Name,
  "BandwidthPercent": BandwidthPercent,
  "AdminState": AdminState,
  "Cos": Cos,
  "Mtu": Mtu,
  "MulticastOptimize": MulticastOptimize,
  "PacketDrop": PacketDrop,
  "Weight": Weight,
  "TotalCount": $c
})

targets.url: /api/v1/cond/Alarms?$filter=(Severity in ('Critical', 'Warning', 'Info') and Flapping eq 'NotFlapping') and (Acknowledge eq 'None') and (Suppressed eq false)&$apply=groupby((Severity),aggregate($count as count))

/api/v1/cond/Alarms?$filter=(Severity in ('Critical', 'Warning', 'Info') or Flapping eq 'NotFlapping') and (Acknowledge eq 'None') and (Suppressed eq true)&$apply=groupby((Severity),aggregate($count as count))
/api/v1/cond/Alarms?$filter=(Severity in ('Critical', 'Warning', 'Info')) and (Acknowledge eq 'Acknowledge') and (Suppressed eq false)&$apply=groupby((Severity),aggregate($count as count))
/api/v1/cond/Alarms?$filter=(Severity in ('Critical', 'Warning', 'Info')) and (Acknowledge eq 'None') and (Suppressed eq false)&$apply=groupby((Code,Severity),aggregate($count as count))
